libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No external service or Docker image is needed; meaningful tests can use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer on localhost. Ensure native test runtime arguments/system properties include -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true for 5.0.1 on Java 25/native-image runs.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: If generated tests exercise OAuth2WebClient specifically, io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2:5.0.1 is an optional artifact dependency, but core WebClient, sessions, forms, redirects, caching, JSON, and local HTTP coverage do not require it.
The unsafe-access requirement should still be confirmed by the authoritative Gradle/native-image run for the generated test.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The artifact is self-contained for normal WebClient coverage, but io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 resolves Netty 4.2.2.Final and needs the same Java 25 native runtime unsafe-access properties already used for 5.0.0.
